name: State AI Program
text1: A nation's military acquired compute through normal defense procurement. Satellite imagery shows a facility with thermal signatures consistent with frontier-scale training. The nation has classified the program.
text2: Multiple nations are running classified military AI programs, each citing its rivals' programs as justification. Enforcement would require simultaneous action against several nuclear powers.
image-prompt: A satellite thermal image overlay on a remote military facility in a desert, heat bloom radiating from a nondescript building surrounded by perimeter fencing, cold blue night sky above, intelligence analyst aesthetic, digital painting, no text
